calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2017 Continued To Mar-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-26-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant BRENT HOFF AKA BRENT MICHAEL HOFF,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $25,801.23
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $659.50
Total Judgment in the amount of $26,460.73

Judgment signed in open court.
